a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Daily protein supply from animal and plant-based foods, World, 1961 to
Daily per capita protein supply is measured in grams per person per day. Protein of animal origin includes protein from all meat
commodities, eggs and dairy products, and fish & seafood.
Data source: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2023)
Note: The FAO apply a methodological change from the year 2010 onwards.
